message:
feat: keyless model support and credential resolution overhaul

Models from local/keyless providers (e.g. Ollama, LM Studio) no longer require
API keys to be considered "available" or "ready." Previously every code path
that checked model readiness used api_key.is_some(), which excluded models
that legitimately need no authentication. This commit introduces a three-tier
credential model:

  1. model_requires_configured_credential(entry) — returns true when the
     provider is known to need auth (has auth_env_keys in provider_metadata,
     has auth_header set, or has an oauth_config).

  2. model_entry_is_ready(entry) — returns true when credentials are NOT
     required OR a non-blank api_key is present.

  3. normalize_api_key_opt(key) — trims whitespace and treats blank strings
     as None, preventing " " or "" from being treated as valid credentials.

Impact across the codebase:

app.rs:
  - resolve_api_key() now returns Result<Option<String>> instead of
    Result<String>. When credentials are not required and none are available,
    Ok(None) is returned instead of Err(MissingApiKey).
  - build_stream_options() accepts Option<String> for api_key.
  - select_model_and_thinking() prefers model_entry_is_ready() over
    api_key.is_some() when picking from provider candidates.
  - models_equal() now normalizes provider aliases via provider_ids_match()
    and compares model IDs case-insensitively, preventing duplicate entries
    when the same model appears under "openrouter" vs "open-router".

models.rs:
  - ModelRegistry::get_available() uses model_entry_is_ready() filter
    instead of api_key.is_some().

agent.rs:
  - resolve_stream_api_key_for_model() normalizes blank keys to None.

rpc.rs:
  - set_model and cycle_model RPC handlers allow keyless models to proceed
    without credentials. Error message changed from "No API key for" to
    "Missing credentials for" for clarity.
  - resolve_model_key() normalizes blank keys via normalize_api_key_opt().

main.rs:
  - Adapted to resolve_api_key() returning Option<String>.

pi_debug.rs:
  - Credential resolution step messaging updated to reflect that some
    models may not require credentials.

interactive/:
  - New PiMsg::CredentialUpdated variant triggers in-memory credential
    refresh after /login completes, so the user doesn't need to restart.
  - sync_active_provider_credentials() reloads auth storage and updates
    the active agent's stream options when the current provider's
    credentials change.
  - /model command checks model_requires_configured_credential() before
    rejecting a switch for missing keys, with improved error message
    directing users to /login.
  - cycle_model (Ctrl+P/Ctrl+Shift+P) now replaces stream_options.api_key
    AND headers when cycling between providers, preventing stale credentials
    from leaking across providers.
  - Ctrl+L model selector changed to open_model_selector_configured_only()
    which includes keyless models that don't require credentials.
  - extension_model_from_entry() treats blank api_key as apiKeyPresent:false.
  - Available models selector includes keyless models without credentials
    in the filtered list. Status messages updated from "API keys" to
    "credentials" terminology.

tests/main_cli_selection.rs:
  - Adapted to resolve_api_key() returning Option<String>.
  - Missing key test explicitly sets auth_header=true to trigger the error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
